hero.alt: Travel and Hospitality AI Dashboard showing customer service metrics and conversational AI solutions

customerSupport.alt: Enhancing Customer Support Travel - 24/7 multilingual support for travel and hospitality businesses

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Welcome to Horizon Hotels and Travel. I’m your AI concierge, here to help with reservations, itinerary details, and guest services — anytime. How can I assist you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I’d like to check availability for a room next weekend.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Of course. May I know your check in and check out dates, please?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Check in on Friday, and check out on Sunday.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you. We have availability.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: We offer a Deluxe Room, and a Premium Sea View Room. Would you like details on pricing and amenities?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, please.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: The Deluxe Room starts at nine thousand five hundred rupees per night.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: The Premium Sea View Room starts at twelve thousand rupees per night, including breakfast. Would you like to book now, or should I hold the room?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’d like to book the Deluxe Room.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great choice. May I confirm — is this booking for two adults?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Your Deluxe Room is now reserved.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’ll receive a confirmation message and payment link shortly.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you also like help with airport transfers, local experiences, or restaurant reservations?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Airport transfer would be helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. I’ve added an airport pickup to your booking.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’ll receive driver details a day before arrival. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. We look forward to hosting you at Horizon Hotels. Have a wonderful day.
